Comment.value: This script exports all texts in a Title in a contextual order
Called from script Export texts to doc

Calculation.Text: "All texts in title " & FAT Title::Reference title & " will be exported to a Word document (HTML) on your desktop. Convert to a proper Word document by open it in Word and save in docx-format."
"All texts in package " & FAT Title::Reference title & " - " & FAT Package::Reference name & " will be exported to a Word document (HTML) on your desktop. "
Case ( IsEmpty($localisation_code); FAT Title::Original localisation code ; $localisation_code)
Case($localisation_code = FAT Title::Original localisation code; False; True)

$html & "

" & "Funkis Authoring Tool © Funkis Multimedia AB " & $$currentyear & "
Title: " & FAT Title::Reference title & ", Client: " & FAT Title::Client name & ", Date: " & Get(currentDate) & ", Original localisation code: " & FAT Title::Original localisation code & "

"

$html & "

" & Upper ( FAT Title::Reference title ) & "

" & ¶ & "



"

$html & "

" & Upper ( TF PK Header::Text ) & "

" & ¶ & TF PK Sub header 1::Text & "

"

$html & "

" & Upper ( TF PK Header TRANS::Text ) & "

" & ¶ & TF PK Sub header 1 TRANS::Text & "

"

Comment.value: Find all chapters with the package as a parent

Calculation.Text:
$html & "

" & $chapter_num & " " & TF CH Header::Text & "

" & ¶ & TF CH Sub header::Text & ¶ & ¶

$html & "

" & $chapter_num & " " & TF CH Header TRANS::Text & "

" & ¶ & TF CH Sub header TRANS::Text & ¶ & ¶

Comment.value: Find all pages with the chapter as a parent

Calculation.Text:
$html & "

" & $chapter_num & "." & $page_num & " " & TF PG Header::Text & "

" & ¶ & TF PG Sub header 1::Text & "

"

$html & "

" & $chapter_num & "." & $page_num & " " & TF PG Header TRANS::Text & "

" & ¶ & TF PG Sub header 1 TRANS::Text & "

"

Comment.value: Find all page_items with the page as a parent

Calculation.Text:
Let ( [ order_num = Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Page::Proxy type ) ; $chapter_num & "." & $page_num & "." & $pageitem_num ; $chapter_num & "." & $page_num); txt0 = "

" & order_num & " " & FAT Page item::DisplayText & " " & "

" & ¶; txt1 = Case ( TF PI Text 1::Text= "" ; ""; PatternCount ( TF PI Text 1::Text ; "

" ); TF PI Text 1::Text; TF PI Text 1::Text & "
"); txt2 = Case ( TF PI Text 2::Text= "" ; ""; PatternCount ( TF PI Text 2::Text ; "

" ); TF PI Text 2::Text; TF PI Text 2::Text & "
"); txt3 = Case ( TF PI Text 3::Text= "" ; ""; PatternCount ( TF PI Text 3::Text ; "

" ); TF PI Text 3::Text; TF PI Text 3::Text & "
"); txt4 = Case ( TF PI Text 4::Text= "" ; ""; PatternCount ( TF PI Text 4::Text ; "

" ); TF PI Text 4::Text; TF PI Text 4::Text & "
"); txt5 = Case ( TF PI Text 5::Text= "" ; ""; PatternCount ( TF PI Text 5::Text ; "

" ); TF PI Text 5::Text; TF PI Text 5::Text & "
"); txt6 = Case ( TF PI Text 6::Text= "" ; ""; PatternCount ( TF PI Text 6::Text ; "

" ); TF PI Text 6::Text; TF PI Text 6::Text & "
"); txt7 = Case ( TF PI Text 7::Text= "" ; ""; PatternCount ( TF PI Text 7::Text ; "

" ); TF PI Text 7::Text; TF PI Text 7::Text & "
") ]; $html & txt0 & txt1 & txt2 & txt3 & txt4 & txt5 & txt6 & txt7 & "
" )

Let ( [ order_num = Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Page::Proxy type ) ; $chapter_num & "." & $page_num & "." & $pageitem_num ; $chapter_num & "." & $page_num); txt0 = "

" & order_num & " " & FAT Page item::DisplayText & " " & "

" & ¶; txt1 = Case ( TF PI Text 1 TRANS::Text= "" ; ""; PatternCount ( TF PI Text 1 TRANS::Text ; "

" ); TF PI Text 1 TRANS::Text; TF PI Text 1 TRANS::Text & "
"); txt2 = Case ( TF PI Text 2 TRANS::Text= "" ; ""; PatternCount ( TF PI Text 2 TRANS::Text ; "

" ); TF PI Text 2 TRANS::Text; TF PI Text 2 TRANS::Text & "
"); txt3 = Case ( TF PI Text 3 TRANS::Text= "" ; ""; PatternCount ( TF PI Text 3 TRANS::Text ; "

" ); TF PI Text 3 TRANS::Text; TF PI Text 3 TRANS::Text & "
"); txt4 = Case ( TF PI Text 4 TRANS::Text= "" ; ""; PatternCount ( TF PI Text 4 TRANS::Text ; "

" ); TF PI Text 4 TRANS::Text; TF PI Text 4 TRANS::Text & "
"); txt5 = Case ( TF PI Text 5 TRANS::Text= "" ; ""; PatternCount ( TF PI Text 5 TRANS::Text ; "

" ); TF PI Text 5 TRANS::Text; TF PI Text 5 TRANS::Text & "
"); txt6 = Case ( TF PI Text 6 TRANS::Text= "" ; ""; PatternCount ( TF PI Text 6 TRANS::Text ; "

" ); TF PI Text 6 TRANS::Text; TF PI Text 6 TRANS::Text & "
"); txt7 = Case ( TF PI Text 7 TRANS::Text= "" ; ""; PatternCount ( TF PI Text 7 TRANS::Text ; "

" ); TF PI Text 7 TRANS::Text; TF PI Text 7 TRANS::Text & "
") ]; $html & txt0 & txt1 & txt2 & txt3 & txt4 & txt5 & txt6 & txt7 & "
" )
FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled = 1

$html & "" & FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List header & "
"

Let ( [ txt1 = Case ( TF LI PI 1::Text= "" ; ""; "" & FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List Text 1 & ": " & TF LI PI 1::Text & " "); txt2 = Case ( TF LI PI 2::Text= "" ; ""; "" & FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List Text 2 & ": " & TF LI PI 2::Text & " "); txt3 = Case ( TF LI PI 3::Text= "" ; ""; "" & FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List Text 3 & ": " & TF LI PI 3::Text & " ") ]; $html & txt1 & txt2 & txt3 & "

" )

Let ( [ txt1 = Case ( TF LI PI 1 TRANS::Text= "" ; ""; "" & FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List Text 1 & ": " & TF LI PI 1 TRANS::Text & " "); txt2 = Case ( TF LI PI 2 TRANS::Text= "" ; ""; "" & FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List Text 2 & ": " & TF LI PI 2 TRANS::Text & " "); txt3 = Case ( TF LI PI 3 TRANS::Text= "" ; ""; "" & FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List Text 3 & ": " & TF LI PI 3 TRANS::Text & " ") ]; $html & txt1 & txt2 & txt3 & "

" )

Comment.value: If list item contais video with subtitle

Calculation.Text: SubtitleMedia ( Media LI PI 1::Container file extension )
FAT List item @ Page item::Media 1 id

$html & "" & FAT List::Name & " (" & List template::Name & ", Title list)
"

While ( [ listitem = List(FAT List item::PrimaryKey ); listitem1_l = List ( TF LI 1::Text ) ; listitem2_l = List ( TF LI 2::Text ) ; listitem3_l = List ( TF LI 3::Text ) ; label1 = "" & List template::Text Label 1 & ": "; label2 = "" & List template::Text Label 2 & ": "; label3 = "" & List template::Text Label 3 & ": "; label_row = label1 & " | " & label2 & " | " & label3; i = 0; str = "" ]; i < ValueCount ( listitem ) ; [ i = i + 1; listitem_str = GetValue ( listitem1_l ; i ) & " | " & GetValue ( listitem2_l ; i ) & " | " & GetValue ( listitem3_l ; i ); str = str & Case ( i < ValueCount ( listitem ) ; listitem_str & "
¶"; listitem_str ) ] ; $html & Case ( IsEmpty ( listitem ); ""; label_row & "
" & "¶" & str & "

" & "¶¶") )

Let ( [ txt1 = Case ( TF LI 1::Text= "" ; ""; "" & List template::Text Label 1 & ": " & TF LI 1::Text & " "); txt2 = Case ( TF LI 2::Text= "" ; ""; "" & List template::Text Label 2 & ": " & TF LI 2::Text & " "); txt3 = Case ( TF LI 3::Text= "" ; ""; "" & List template::Text Label 3 & ": " & TF LI 3::Text & " ") ]; $html & txt1 & txt2 & txt3 & "

" )

Let ( [ txt1 = Case ( TF LI 1 TRANS::Text= "" ; ""; "" & List template::Text Label 1 & ": " & TF LI 1 TRANS::Text & " "); txt2 = Case ( TF LI 2 TRANS::Text= "" ; ""; "" & List template::Text Label 2 & ": " & TF LI 2 TRANS::Text & " "); txt3 = Case ( TF LI 3 TRANS::Text= "" ; ""; "" & List template::Text Label 3 & ": " & TF LI 3 TRANS::Text & " ") ]; $html & txt1 & txt2 & txt3 & "

" )

Comment.value: If list item contais video with subtitle

Calculation.Text: SubtitleMedia ( Media LI PI 1::Container file extension )
FAT List item @ Page item::Media 1 id

$html & "

" & $sprigstory_name & " - Sprig story.
Please note, texts in a sprig story will appear in strange orders which is the nature of a branched narrative."
Not IsEmpty ( FAT IO @ Page item::PrimaryKey )

While ( [ name_l = List ( FAT IO @ Page item::Name ) ; type_l = List ( FAT IO @ Page item::IO type ); i = 0; str = "" ]; i < ValueCount ( name_l ) ; [ i = i + 1; name_str = GetValue ( name_l ; i ); type_str = GetValue ( type_l ; i ); str = str & Case ( i < ValueCount ( name_l ) ; name_str & " - " & type_str & ", "; name_str & " - " & type_str ) ] ; $html & Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT IO @ Page item::PrimaryKey ); ""; "IOs connected: " & str & "

" & "¶¶") )

Comment.value: Add a table of all IOs in the Title - Perfect for AI prompting

Calculation.Text:
$html & "

" & "IO Overview" & "

" & ¶ & "This section is for Insight generation only" & "

" & ¶ & ¶

$html & "<table border=\"1\" cellpadding=\"4\" cellspacing=\"0\" width=\"100%\" style=\"font-family: Arial; font-size: 12pt;\"> <tr> <th align=\"left\">Name</th> <th align=\"left\">Description</th> <th align=\"left\">Type</th> </tr>" & ¶ & ¶
$html & " " & FAT IO::Name & " " & FAT IO::Author description & " - " & FAT IO::Insight description & " " & FAT IO::IO type & " "

$html & "<tr> <td colspan=\"3\"> <table border=\"1\" cellpadding=\"3\" cellspacing=\"0\" width=\"95%\" align=\"center\" style=\"font-family: Arial; font-size: 10pt;\">" & ¶ & ¶ & "<tr> <th align=\"left\">Field name</th> <th align=\"left\">Field type</th> <th align=\"left\">List</th> </tr>" & ¶ & ¶
$html & " " & FAT IO Field::Name & " " & IO Field Type::Name & " - " & IO Field Type::Value type & " " & FAT IO Field::List name & " " & ¶ & ¶
